news.summary: Powercast Corporation, a leader in wireless charging solutions, won top honors for their RFID-powered sensor monitoring system designed for data center equipment. The system operates without wires or batteries and received recognition on May 9, 2025, in Pittsburgh. This innovative technology is customized for monitoring data center equipment and is expected to revolutionize the industry.
news.headline: Powercast wins Best New Product at RFID Journal LIVE for battery-free sensor monitoring system, tailored for data centers.

news.summary: Protagonist Therapeutics Inc. and Johnson & Johnson have unveiled fresh clinical data from the Phase 3 ICONIC-TOTAL examination of icotrokinra for scalp and genital psoriasis. Noteworthy results from the skin sites section unveiled that by the 16th week, 57% of patients under once daily icotrokinra obtained the primary endpoint based on the Investigator's Global Assessment (IGA) score of 0/1, signifying clear or near-clear skin, with a ≥2-grade enhancement from the baseline at Week 16, while only 6% of patients on placebo achieved the same. Additionally, 66% of individuals with scalp psoriasis reached a scalp-specific Investigator's Global Assessment (ss-IGA) score of 0/1 compared to the 11% on placebo after 16 weeks. Furthermore, a notable 77% of patients with genital psoriasis received a static Physician's Global Assessment of... (the remaining details are accessible on Benzinga.com).
news.headline: Protagonist & Johnson & Johnson's drug showed skin clearance success in psoriasis study. 57% vs. 6% in treatment vs. placebo achieved clear skin at week 16. Scalp psoriasis success was at 66% vs. 11%, and genital psoriasis success was at 77%.

news.summary: Cambio, a reputable AI-driven commercial real estate operations platform, has revealed on May 9, 2025, in New York that they are the primary choice for industry professionals due to their commitment to providing uninterrupted access to crucial energy data and analytics. This platform is considered a reliable source by many, with a significant number of users relying on it for their commercial real estate needs.
news.headline: Cambio Vault offers free backup for ENERGY STAR Portfolio Manager data amid EPA program uncertainty. Industry-trusted platform safeguards critical energy info.

news.summary: In Ferndale, Michigan on May 9, 2025, drivers and fillers employed by Airgas and represented by Teamsters Local 283 are demanding a fair contract. They have unanimously voted to authorize a strike as a result of the company's continuous failure to provide a satisfactory agreement. The workers are prepared to take action to ensure their demands are met.
news.headline: Teamsters at Airgas in Ferndale, MI authorize strike due to lack of fair contract offer, all drivers and fillers on board.

news.summary: Shares of Pinterest and Lyft have surged on the stock market due to increased competition in their respective industries. Pinterest's stock rose by 5%, reaching a new high of $80 per share. Lyft also experienced a notable increase of 4% in their share price, now standing at $60 per share. On the other hand, Expedia and Affirm saw a decline in their stock values. Expedia’s shares decreased by 3% to $110 per share, while Affirm witnessed a drop of 2%, settling at $70 per share. This stock movement reflects the ongoing dynamics within the tech and transportation sectors.
news.headline: Pinterest and Lyft stocks rise due to competition; Expedia and Affirm stocks decline. Find more on Bloomberg.com.

news.summary: The Metropolitan Police has reported that an estimated sum exceeding $20 million of stolen funds has been orchestrated to pass through a network of shell companies for laundering.
news.headline: Three individuals arrested by UK Police in connection with a $20M crypto scam; accused of laundering stolen funds through shell companies.

news.summary: In Toronto, a new bill titled Bill 5, Protect Ontario by Unleashing our Economy Act, 2025, introduced by the Ford Conservatives, has raised concerns. This proposed law challenges workers' rights by potentially removing health and safety regulations, minimum wage guarantees, and employment safeguards. Under this legislation, employees may face limited options for recourse in cases of workplace injuries, termination, or mistreatment. The bill, currently in its second reading in the Ontario legislative process, specifically addresses these issues in Schedule 9, impacting the livelihoods of Ontarians. If passed, it could change the landscape for workers by eliminating key protections that have thus far been integral to their work environments.
news.headline: CUPE Ontario warns of Ford's Bill 5 bringing US-style labor practices to Ontario, removing worker protections.

news.summary: In Traverse City, Michigan, on May 9, 2025, the 34th edition of the California Mille took place from April 27th to May 1st. This 1,000-mile driving escapade navigated through the picturesque driving routes of Northern California. Participants enthusiastically drove vintage cars reminiscent of the era of Italy's iconic Mille Miglia road race.
news.headline: California Mille, a 1,000-mile driving event through Northern California's scenic roads, marked its 34th running from April 27th to May 1st, with vintage cars akin to Italy's Mille Miglia.

news.summary: Concirrus, a prominent provider of AI-focused insurance solutions, has revealed the hiring of Steve O'Reilly as Product Manager to drive the next phase of AI-led product innovation and business growth. The strategic appointment comes in London on May 9, 2025, marking a significant move for the company. Steve O'Reilly's role will be crucial in propelling the company's operations forward, signaling a strong commitment to advancing their technology and expanding their market presence.
news.headline: Concirrus hires Steve O'Reilly as Product Manager to drive AI-led innovation for insurance solutions.

news.summary: 1280 Financial Partners, a team based in Florida, Ohio, and South Carolina, has opted for Sanctuary's Partnered Independence model to enhance growth and client service. Sanctuary has made a minority investment in 1280 Financial Partners. The decision was announced on May 9, 2025.

news.summary: Stock prices for CrowdStrike, a cybersecurity company, dropped following news that its senior executives are under investigation by the government. The probe involves a technology distributor and the IRS. This development led to a decline in CrowdStrike's shares, highlighting investor concerns.

Despite this, each company remains optimistic about their Q2 sales prospects. Pinterest joins Meta and Reddit in providing positive ad revenue projections amid worries about tariffs.
news.headline: Pinterest, Meta, Reddit stay positive on Q2 sales despite tariff concerns. Stocks hit, but optimism remains.

news.summary: Dublin - A recent report on the Japan Social Commerce Market reveals that the industry is projected to expand by 9.9% annually, reaching a value of US$25.33 billion by 2025. The market in Japan saw significant growth during the period under review. The report, available on ResearchAndMarkets.com, provides insights on over 50 key performance indicators related to Social Commerce Trends, segmented by end-use sectors, operational KPIs, retail product dynamics, and consumer demographics.
news.headline: Japan's social commerce market to grow by 9.9% annually, reaching US$25.33 billion by 2025. LINE dominates, focus on sustainable shopping and regulations observed - ResearchAndMarkets.com.

news.summary: Starting on Sunday, May 11, 2025, Comerica Bank and the Detroit Tigers will kick off their Small Business of the Month initiative for 2025. This program aims to acknowledge small businesses in the metro Detroit area. It offers essential resources to help promote services and brands to reach a broader audience.
news.headline: Comerica Bank & Detroit Tigers collaborate for 2025 Small Business of the Month program to support metro Detroit businesses.

news.summary: Bitcoin has surpassed the $100,000 mark for the first time since January, leading to speculation of a new all-time high above $110,000 in May. Bitcoin Suisse reports that Bitcoin's high Sharpe ratio of 1.72, second only to gold, highlights its maturity as an asset with superior risk-adjusted returns. The market is currently buyer-dominant, showing strong institutional and retail interest that could lead to a supply squeeze and push prices even higher. Bitcoin has proven to perform well in both risk-on and risk-off environments since the US presidential elections, acting as both a macro hedge and a high-conviction growth asset. There is anticipation for Bitcoin to enter an "acceleration phase" with explosive price surges, driven by institutional interest and inflows of over $4.5 billion into Bitcoin ETFs since April. With a shift in demand towards buyers and a strong Sharpe ratio, Bitcoin could potentially exceed $110,000 in May as more corporations and institutions enter the market.
news.headline: Growing chance of Bitcoin hitting highs above $110k in May due to strong institutional and retail interest. Bitcoin's bullish momentum driven by its ability to perform well in both risk-on and risk-off environments. Buyer-dominant market signals potential supply squeeze. BTC breached $100k mark, with speculation of new all-time high. Sharpe ratio of 1.72, highlighting Bitcoin's maturity as an asset. High market potential with over $4.5B spot inflows since April.

news.summary: Coinbase Global, a cryptocurrency exchange, recently made a significant acquisition and is projected to have a brighter future amid a surge in cryptocurrency prices in the second quarter. Despite missing first-quarter estimates, analysts remain optimistic. Goldman Sachs analyst James Yaro maintained a Neutral rating on Coinbase and raised the price target to $209. Canaccord analyst Joseph Vafi maintained a Buy rating with a $400 price target. Yaro believes that the expanding crypto market could offset the earnings miss, highlighting Coinbase's acquisition of Deribit as the largest in crypto history. Transaction revenue in the second quarter is expected to be strong, with April figures reaching $240 million. This news and more can be read on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Coinbase analysts predict brighter Q2 after disappointing Q1: Goldman Sachs raises target to $209, Canaccord targets $400. Deribit acquisition largest in history. Bullish on crypto market growth.

news.summary: BitStarz, a highly reputable online casino established in 2014, has emerged as a top choice for players seeking a combination of crypto-friendly features and a wide selection of real-money casino games. The platform accepts both Bitcoin and traditional currencies, offering players flexibility and fairness in their gaming experience. Key details include a game selection of 6,000+ titles, acceptance of USD, EUR, and 500+ cryptocurrencies, multiple payment methods including crypto wallets and bank transfers, instant crypto withdrawals, and a welcome bonus of 300% up to 5 BTC + 180 Free Spins. BitStarz stands out for its extensive game library from 40+ software providers, including slots, table games, live casino options, and jackpot games. The platform also hosts various promotions and tournaments with generous prize pools. Despite some country restrictions and high wagering requirements on bonuses, BitStarz excels in transparency and player-centric policies.
news.headline: BitStarz casino offers 5 BTC bonuses, 180 free spins for new players. Wide game selection of 6,000+ titles from top providers. Welcome package up to $500 or 5 BTC with 40x wagering. Pros: Accepts crypto, fast withdrawals. Cons: Country restrictions, high wagering.

news.summary: Embecta Corp. (NASDAQ: EMBC) reported in the second quarter of 2025 an increase in adjusted earnings to 70 cents per share from 67 cents the previous year, surpassing the anticipated 53 cents. The diabetes care company disclosed sales of $259 million, exceeding the expected $253.94 million. Overall, revenues decreased by 9.8% on a reported basis and 7.7% on an adjusted constant currency basis. In the U.S., revenues dropped by 8.4% on both reported and adjusted constant currency bases. Internationally, revenues saw a decline of 11.3% on a reported basis and 7.0% on an adjusted constant currency basis. Gross profit and margin stood at $164.1 million and 63.4% respectively, in comparison to the previous figures of $185.4 million and 64.6%. The latest information on this development can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Embecta stock falls as Q2 2025 earnings beat consensus with $259M sales, down 9.8%. US revenues decreased 8.4%, intl down 11.3%. Gross profit at $164.1M, 63.4%.

news.summary: In Albuquerque, New Mexico, on May 9, 2025, ClearSky Health, a leading provider of rehabilitative healthcare, revealed intentions to construct a 36-bed medical rehabilitation hospital in Eau Claire, Wisconsin. This forthcoming facility will mark the organization's 16th hospital in the United States and is expected to commence operations in the near future.
news.headline: ClearSky Health to open 16th hospital in Eau Claire, Wisconsin with 36 beds, expanding its rehabilitative healthcare services.

news.summary: Auguste Escoffier School of Culinary Arts (Escoffier), based in Schaumburg, Illinois, disclosed on May 9, 2025, that it has been recognized as a top workplace for the sixth consecutive year by Great Place To Work®. As the leading culinary school brand in the United States, Escoffier has earned this certification, further solidifying its reputation as an exceptional employer. This achievement is a testament to the positive work environment cultivated at Escoffier, setting it apart from others in the industry. This accreditation by independent analysts underscores Escoffier's commitment to providing a supportive and rewarding atmosphere for its employees.
news.headline: Auguste Escoffier School of Culinary Arts in SCHAUMBURG, US, certified as a great workplace for the sixth year in a row.

news.summary: ANI Pharmaceuticals Inc (NASDAQ: ANIP) announced first-quarter adjusted earnings of $1.70 per share, surpassing last year's $1.21 and exceeding the expected $1.38 per share. The company's sales totaled $197.12 million, marking a 43.4% increase from the previous year and beating the projected $180.68 million. Excluding the Alimera acquisition, organic net revenue saw a 31.7% year-over-year growth. Net revenues for rare diseases, including Cortrophin gel, Iluvien, and Yutiq, soared by 86.7% to $69.0 million. Cortrophin Gel net revenues climbed 43.1% to $52.9 million due to increased volume. During the quarter, ANI Pharmaceuticals witnessed a surge in demand, recording the highest number of new patient starts and new cases initiated since launch. Cortrophin Gel experienced growth throughout the period.
news.headline: ANI Pharmaceuticals Inc reported Q1 earnings of $1.70/share, up from $1.21 a year ago, with sales of $197.12 million, up 43.4%. Cortrophin Gel net revenues increased 43.1% to $52.9 million. CEO notes strong demand and positioning against potential tariff impact.

news.summary: Pepe (CRYPTO: PEPE) has surged by 30%, leading to a significant increase in liquidations and whale activities within the cryptocurrency market. The meme coin is currently valued at $0.00001252 with a market cap of $5.26 billion, showing a 29.9% increase in the last 24 hours and a 42.7% rise over the past week. Meanwhile, Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) is priced at $0.2043 with a market cap of $30.5 billion, reflecting a 9.1% increase in the last 24 hours and a 12.3% increase over the last seven days. Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) stands at $0.00001500 with a market cap of $8.8 billion, experiencing a 9.4% surge in the past 24 hours and a 10.7% increase over the last seven days. Notably, crypto trader MaxBecauseBTC has pointed out that Pepe is approaching a crucial resistance level at the 180-day VWAP, alongside a significant retest of the trend breakdown from February. He suggests that a breakout at this point could trigger a rapid price surge for Pepe. Traders are now closely monitoring the developments, with expectations of a highly active weekend for the meme coin.
news.headline: Pepe cryptocurrency surges 30%, surpassing Dogecoin and Shiba Inu in trading volume. Price: $0.00001252, Market Cap: $5.26 billion.

news.summary: As of March 31, 2025, the total number of voting rights and shares forming the capital has been disclosed. This information is critical for stakeholders as it provides insights into the governance structure and ownership of the company. Investors and analysts use this data to assess the company's performance and decision-making processes. Having transparency regarding voting rights and capital composition ensures accountability and can influence investment decisions. It is a way for companies to communicate with their shareholders and demonstrate financial integrity. These figures serve as key indicators of the company's financial health and market position.
news.headline: BIC: Total voting rights and shares as of March 31, 2025 disclosed.
